title: Frederick II, Holy Roman Emperor becomes King of Sicily
fact: Frederick II was King of Sicily from 1198, King of Germany from 1212, King of Italy and Holy Roman Emperor from 1220, and King of Jerusalem from 1225 to 1228.

title: Charles III of Spain becomes King of Sicily
fact: Charles III was King of Spain from 1759 until his death in 1788.

title: John II of Aragon becomes King of Sicily
fact: John II, called the Great or the Faithless, was King of Aragon from 1458 until his death in 1479.

title: Peter III of Aragon becomes King of Sicily
fact: Peter III of Aragon was King of Aragon, King of Valencia, and Count of Barcelona from 1276 to his death.

title: Victor Amadeus II of Savoy becomes King of Sicily
fact: Victor Amadeus II was the head of the House of Savoy and ruler of the Savoyard states from 12 June 1675 until his abdication in 1730.

title: Martin of Aragon becomes King of Sicily
fact: Martin the Humane, also called the Elder and the Ecclesiastic, was King of Aragon, Valencia, Sardinia and Corsica and Count of Barcelona from 1396 and King of Sicily from 1409.

title: Frederick III of Sicily becomes King of Sicily
fact: Frederick III ; 13 December 1272 – 25 June 1337) was the regent of the Kingdom of Sicily from 1291 until 1295 and subsequently King of Sicily from 1295 until his death.

title: Martin I of Sicily becomes King of Sicily
fact: Martin I of Sicily, called the Younger, was King of Sicily from his marriage to Queen Maria in 1390 until his death in 1409.
